name: Mixer Mono
description: This algorithm is a mono mixer - it mixes mono inputs to a mono output. Up to four aux send busses are available, which can be switched to pre- or post-fade.
gui_description: The display shows a level meter for each channel. The thin line at the top indicates 0dBFS; if a channel goes over this, a clip indicator will show. The chevrons to the right of the level meters indicate the mixer gains. Mute and Solo are indicated with a small 'M' and 'S' respectively. Muted level meters are grayed out.

parameters.name: Output mode
parameters.description: The standard Add/Replace mode selector as described above.

parameters.name: Destination
parameters.description: The output bus for the send.

parameters.name: Pre/post
parameters.description: Whether the send is Pre-fade or Post-fade.

parameters.name: Output mode
parameters.description: The standard Add/Replace mode selector as described above.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: A text name for the channel for identification.

output_ports.name: Duplicate output
output_ports.description: An optional duplicate output. Convenient if you want to drive a stereo bus from a mono mix.
